name: Typing & Mathematics Island
tagline: A gamified touch-typing and maths quest for children
description: Typing & Mathematics Island is a free learning game from Techbridge University College that combines touch-typing practice with mathematics puzzles and fraction drills for children. Learners travel an island map, playing typing and maths mini-games to build keyboarding skill and number sense at the same time.
features: An island map that unlocks typing and maths mini-games as children progress
Touch-typing practice built into every level
Mathematics puzzles and dedicated fraction drills (the Fraction Bakery)
Arcade-style levels such as Block Counter, Bridge Shooter, and Cosmic Blitz
A friendly character guide and on-screen keyboard to support young learners
Free to play in the browser
audience: Children learning touch typing and mathematics, and the teachers and parents supporting them

faqs.a: It is a free learning game from Techbridge University College that combines touch-typing practice with mathematics puzzles and fraction drills for children, played across an island map of mini-games.
Primary-age children building typing skill and number sense, and the teachers and parents supporting them.
Touch typing alongside mathematics, including fractions, through arcade-style mini-games rather than drills alone.
Yes. It runs free in a web browser, with no account required to start playing.
